generalities.text: Main THE ENCYCLOPEDIA OF PURE MATERIA MEDICA By TIMOTHY F. ALLEN, A.M., M.D. Presented by Médi-T KALI FERROCYANATUM. Potassium ferrocyanide (Blut-laugen-salz). Preparation , Triturations. Authorities. 1 , Dr. James B. Bell, provings Hahnemann. Month., 2, 43, D. R., a man aged 27, took 1/2 grain of 1st trit., at 3 P.M.; 2 , Miss H. R., aged 28 (subject to dysmenia), took 2 grains of 3d trit. in some water, at 10 P.M.; 2 a , same prover took 4 grains of 3d trit., eight days later; 3 , Dr. Burleigh Smart, Amer. J. Med. Sc., 15, p. 365, effects of continued "full doses" in patients. MIND. ► Feeling of sadness and some disposition to tears, caused by an impression that he was soon to die and leave his friends; disposition to take a sad view of the beauties of autumn; the apprehension of approaching sickness and death can be overcome by reason, but soon returns (in the afternoon, third day), [1] . ► Irritable and easily vexed (second day), [2] . HEAD. ► Vertigo, coldness, and numbness, with a sensation of gastric sinking, sometimes universal tremors, as in an ague fit, [3] . NOSE. ► Desire to sneeze, very soon, [1] . ► Much sneezing during the forenoon, and mucous discharge from the nose (second day), [1] . MOUTH. ► Ptyalism, with redness, swelling, and tenderness of the gums, and aphthæ of the mouth and fauces, [3] . THROAT. ► For three days the throat feels dry and sore on waking, but soon after expectoration came on with relief, [1] . ► Wakes early, with a sensation as though the pharynx was raw and the tonsils swollen; relieved after rising by expectoration of creamlike mucus (second day), [1] . STOMACH. ► Slight nausea for a few minutes, while dressing in the morning (second day), [2] . [10.] ► Sensation of gastric sinking, [3] . SEXUAL ORGANS. ► Male. ► Almost involuntary coition in a half waking state, with imperfect erection; too early emission and little pleasure (first night), [1] . ► Emission of semen, with indistinct amorous dreams (second and third nights), [1] . ► Female. ► Leucorrha, all day; is subject to it only just after menses (second day), [2] . ► Menses came on four days too late (after eleven days); the usual pain commenced at the proper date, but the flow did not begin as usual with the pain; bearing-down pains much less than usual (curative?), [2a] . HEART AND PULSE. ► Lessens the action of the heart, diminishes the number of its beats in a minute, and softening and lessening the volume of the pulse, [3] . ► A full dose of this substance will often reduce the number of pulsations in a well person ten beats in a minute, in a few minutes after being taken, [3] . SUPERIOR EXTREMITIES. ► Pain in the shoulder-joints on motion, in the morning, on rising (second day), [2] . ► Fingers slightly swollen about the joints, in the morning on rising (second day), [2] . ► Lameness of the fingers and wrist-joints of both hands, left rather worse, in the morning on rising (second day), [2] . INFERIOR EXTREMITIES. ► Pain and lameness in right hip-joint, early in the morning, going off in the afternoon; only felt when walking (second day); felt for three or four days, at times worse in the forenoon, [1] . [20.] ► Pain through the hips, lower part of the back, and bowels, like the pain she feels during the menses; same bearing-down or dragging-down feeling; left hip more than the right; feels irritable and easily vexed (is subject to these feelings during the menses, but they are not now present); after a ride in a carriage in the afternoon (second day), [2] . ► Severe pain in the knees, on stooping, in the afternoon (second day), [2] . GENERAL SYMPTOMS. ► Sometimes universal tremors, as in an ague fit, [3] . ► Numbness, [3] . ► (Morning) pains all disappeared about 2 P.M. (second day), [2] . FEVER. ► Coldness, [3] . CONDITIONS. ► Aggravation. ► ( Morning ), On waking, throat dry, etc.; on waking, pharynx raw, etc.; while dressing, nausea; on rising pain when moving shoulder-joints; on rising, lameness of fingers, etc. ► ( Forenoon ), Only when walking, pain, etc., in hip-joint. ► ( Afternoon ), On stooping, pain in knees. Copyright © Médi-T ® 2000 Main
Clinical: Chlorosis; Debility; Dysmenorrhœa; Dyspepsia; Heart, fatty degeneration of; Leucorrhœa; Menorrhagia; Rheumatism

Debility; pale lips, gums, and skin; cold hands and feet; frequent profuse watery urine, sometimes with traces of clotted blood; wandering neuralgic pains; periodic neuralgia of head following sun. Copyright © Médi-T ® 2000 Main.

keynotes.text: The Ferrocyanide of Potash is prepared "by fusing animal substances such as the cuttings of horns, hoofs, and skins with Carbonate of Potash in an iron pot, lixiviating the crude product with water, and purifying the salt with crystallisation" (Brunton). In the old school the only uses made of this salt are as a test, and in the preparation of Hcy. ac. Thanks to a proving made under the guidance of J. B. Bell, homœopaths have found in it a remedy rivalling Sepia in the uterine sphere, and Kali c. in its action on the heart. The Kali element seems the predominating power in this salt. The bearing-down sensation and the gastric sinking are prominent indications. Menses too frequent and too profuse. Passive uterine hæmorrhages. There is a periodicity in the complaints of K. fcy. Debility, tremors, numbness, hæmorrhages, chlorosis, wandering neuralgic pains are among its general effects. W. G. Dietz reports (Amer. Hom., xxiii. 58, quoting N. A. J. H.) this case: Mrs. H., 23, mother of three children, small, anæmic, weak. Four years ill with "incurable heart disease," as she had been told. Symptoms: Much distress in heart region. Frequent attacks of pain, a severe ache with occasional sharp plunges; generally by moving about, exertion, and > by rest; occasionally the conditions are reversed. Palpitation generally accompanies the paroxysms, but may occur independently. Mentally depressed, knows she has heart disease and is going to die." Appetite fitful bowels inclined to be constipated. Urine pale, 1,014, passed frequently. No abnormal constituents. Chilly, hands and feet cold. No organic disease of heart discovered. Has taken quantities of patent medicines. K. fcy. 1x three times a day, improved in two weeks and cured in four months.─The symptoms are on rising; on awaking; in the morning; on moving; on walking. > In afternoon. Touch ; patients very sensitive to touch.

_raw: Compare: Sep. (bearing-down pus-like leucorrhœa, profuse, unirritating; sadness even to tears sinking sensation; passive uterine hæmorrhage with consequent debility); K. ca. (gastric sinking connected with weakened heart; heart-beats diminished in number and force with consequent coldness, sinking, vertigo, tremors); K. cy. (periodic neuralgia); Stann. (sun-headaches) Fer. and K. ca. (chlorosis); Digit. (heart-poison; slow pulse) K. ca., K. chl. (sensitiveness to touch); Collins.; Hcy. ac.

mental_emotional.text: Sad; tearful; thinks he will soon die and leave his friends. Irritable, easily vexed.

head.text: Vertigo, coldness, numbness, with sensation of gastric sinking, sometimes universal tremors as in ague fit. Periodic neuralgia following the sun.

nose.text: Much sneezing during pressure and mucous discharge.

mouth_throat.text: Ptyalism, with redness, swelling, and tenderness of gums, and aphthæ of mouth and fauces. Throat sore and dry on waking, but soon after expectoration came on with >. On waking, sensation as if fauces raw and tonsils swollen.

stomach_abdomen.text: Sinking. Slight nausea when dressing. Acidity; sour eructations; flatulence, sour or tasting of ingesta; pressure at stomach after eating accompanying symptoms of uterus.

male.text: Too early emissions and little pleasure. Nocturnal emission with indistinct amorous dreams.

female.text: Menses: too frequent and too profuse; late; metrorrhagia. Passive painless flow, natural colour, thin, causing much debility. Leucorrhœa: like pus, yellowish, creamy, profuse, unirritating; only after menses, usually by day; with pain in small of back. Sensitiveness of hypogastrium to pressure, womb tender (during pregnancy).

chest_heart.text: (Fatty heart with weak, irregular pulse.). Heart's action weakened and slowed. (Hypertrophy with dilatation. Functional heart disorders with anæmia.).
